Motion To Release Funds
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sydney Hall, Esq. 650-342-1830 for Plaintiff HELEN TAN.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HELEN TAN's Motion To Release Funds is granted.

Order and stipulation for order releasing funds pursuant to Stipulated Judgment is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CATHERINE M. LEE OF MUSICK PEELER, TEL. NO. 1-415-281-2024 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'s motion for discharge, dismissal and attorney's fees is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Noticeof Motion And Motion For Order Of Discharge And Dismissal Of Plaintiff Helen Tans Complaint And Award Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Defendant First National Bank of California's motion for discharge, dismissal, and fees and costs is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Bank is awarded fees and costs of $4702. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
